---
title: Illustration d'après the House of Mirth de Edith Wharton
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557512/edithwharton_20201115_smvti0.png
description: Illustration d'après the House of Mirth de Edith Wharton
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2020-11-15
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557512/edithwharton_20201115_smvti0.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
